title: Read-only audit in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Focus on constraints: source naming, bound/unbound Project OS envelope rules, and whether Claude/FUGUE sources would require extra fields or fail validation for GHA backup recording. Return actionable conclusion with file evidence.
summary_text: **Actionable Conclusion** `claude`/`fugue`-style non-`kernel*` sources do **not** need extra Project OS fields for backup recording, but the repo’s current `kernel-*` backup sources **will fail** with the active `codex_kernel_guard` validator unless you provide bound Project OS fields. **Evidence** 1. This repo emits `kernel-*` sources without Project OS fields: - [scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:146](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:146) - [scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:195](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:195) - [scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:116](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:116) 2. Wrapper forwards only basic fields to `backup-record` (no `project-os-*` flags): - [scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:263](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:263) - [scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:270](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:270) 3. External validator rule: any source starting with `kernel` is bound, and bound records require ticket/acceptance/scope: - [task_backup.py:263](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py:263) - [task_backup.py:274](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py:274) - [task_backup.py:276](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py:276) - [task_backup.py:278](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py:278) 4. Unbound behavior exists for non-`kernel*` sources: - [task_backup.py:242](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py:242) - [task_backup.py:267](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py:267) 5. `claude-stop-hook` works unbound without extra fields in validator tests: - [test_task_backup.py:557](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/tests/test_task_backup.py:557) - [test_task_backup.py:560](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/tests/test_task_backup.py:560) 6. Bound-envelope requirement is explicitly tested to fail without ticket fields: - [test_task_backup.py:346](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/tests/test_task_backup.py:346) - [test_task_backup.py:347](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/tests/test_task_backup.py:347) 7. GHA workflow validation itself is permissive for `source` (non-empty string only), so failure point is pre-dispatch validator: - [.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml:67](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml:67) - [.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml:76](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml:76) 8. Test gap in this repo: backup tests stub out validator (`SystemExit(0)`), so bound/unbound regressions won’t be caught here: - [tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:16](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh:16) - [tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh:17](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh:17) **Recommended next move** 1. If `kernel-*` source naming is intentional, add and plumb: `--project-os-ticket-id`, `--acceptance`, `--authority-scope kernel_execution_only` into the milestone/run-complete call chain. 2. If you want lightweight records, rename those sources to non-`kernel*` labels. 3. Add one integration test that runs real `codex_kernel_guard backup-record` (not stub) for both `kernel-*` and `claude-*` sources.
